Render a ks_context as Compact DSL Text

Source: R/context.R
as_compact.Rd

Produces a token-efficient text representation of a table context for LLM prompt injection. Column names are not repeated per cell; span headers group measure columns, and sections appear as bracketed headers.

Usage

as_compact(x, ...)

Arguments

x

A ks_context (or later ks_facts) object.

...

Unused; for S3 compatibility.

Value

A length-1 character string.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
study <- ks_load("path/to/outputs/meta", ids = c("14-3.01"))
cat(as_compact(study[["14-3.01"]]))
} # }
